prompt: {"type":"seasonal comparison landscape collage","subject":"the same Japanese mountain hot spring town street and river shown in four seasons","setting":{"location":"traditional Japanese riverside onsen town","features":["clear shallow river with visible rocks","small arched pedestrian bridge over the river","stone-paved riverside walkway with black wooden railings","multi-story wooden ryokan or inn on the right with warm interior lighting","forested mountains in the background","village buildings receding into the valley"]},"layout":{"format":"2x2 grid collage","sections":[{"title":"春","position":"top-left","count":1,"labels":["spring"]},{"title":"夏","position":"top-right","count":1,"labels":["summer"]},{"title":"秋","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"labels":["autumn"]},{"title":"冬","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"labels":["winter"]}],"consistency":"identical camera angle and composition in all 4 panels"},"seasonal_variants":{"count":4,"items":[{"season":"春","trees":"pale pink cherry blossoms in full bloom arching over the left side","ground":"dry stone path with dappled spring light","atmosphere":"fresh, soft, mild daylight"},{"season":"夏","trees":"dense vivid green foliage creating cool shade","ground":"sunlit and shaded stone path","atmosphere":"bright clear summer day with lush vegetation"},{"season":"秋","trees":"brilliant red, orange, and golden maple leaves","ground":"warm amber light on the path","atmosphere":"crisp autumn colors across the mountainside"},{"season":"冬","trees":"bare branches and heavy snow covering trees, bridge, rooftops, and railings","ground":"snowy riverside path","atmosphere":"overcast snowy day with falling snow and cold mist"}]},"human_elements":{"count":4,"description":"small groups of pedestrians walking along the left riverside path in each panel, scaled naturally and secondary to the scenery"},"signage":{"count":1,"description":"vertical stone sign near the inn on the right riverbank with Japanese kanji"},"style":{"look":"highly detailed photorealistic travel photography","lighting":"natural seasonal lighting, cinematic, realistic reflections in water","composition":"wide scenic view, leading lines from the walkway and bridge, balanced architecture and nature","quality":"ultra-detailed, crisp textures, realistic water, foliage, wood, stone, and snow"},"prompt":"Create a photorealistic 2x2 comparison image of {argument name=\"location\" default=\"a traditional Japanese mountain hot spring town\"} shown in four seasons from the exact same viewpoint. The scene features a clear rocky river flowing through the center, a small arched pedestrian bridge, a stone-paved riverside walkway with black railings on the left, and a large wooden ryokan on the right with warmly lit windows. Add forested mountains and scattered town buildings in the distance. Top-left panel labeled 春 shows spring with blooming cherry blossoms; top-right panel labeled 夏 shows lush green summer foliage; bottom-left panel labeled 秋 shows vivid red and orange autumn leaves; bottom-right panel labeled 冬 shows snowy winter trees, bridge, rooftops, and falling snow. Include a few pedestrians on the left path in each panel. Add the season kanji in white at the upper-left corner of each panel. Emphasize realistic seasonal changes while keeping architecture, framing, and perspective identical across all four panels."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"四季对比风景拼贴","subject":"同一日本山间温泉小镇街道与河流的四季景象","setting":{"location":"传统的日本河畔温泉小镇","features":["清澈的浅河，可见河底岩石","横跨河流的小型拱形人行桥","铺设石板的河畔步道，配有黑色木质栏杆","右侧为多层木质日式旅馆，透出温暖的室内灯光","背景为森林覆盖的山脉","村庄建筑向山谷延伸"]},"layout":{"format":"2x2 网格拼贴","sections":[{"title":"春","position":"左上","count":1,"labels":["春季"]},{"title":"夏","position":"右上","count":1,"labels":["夏季"]},{"title":"秋","position":"左下","count":1,"labels":["秋季"]},{"title":"冬","position":"右下","count":1,"labels":["冬季"]}],"consistency":"4 个面板的摄像机角度和构图完全一致"},"seasonal_variants":{"count":4,"items":[{"season":"春","trees":"左侧拱起盛开的淡粉色樱花","ground":"干燥的石板路，洒满春日斑驳的光影","atmosphere":"清新、柔和、温和的日光"},{"season":"夏","trees":"茂密生动的绿色枝叶，营造出凉爽的树荫","ground":"阳光照射与阴影交织的石板路","atmosphere":"明亮晴朗的夏日，植被繁茂"},{"season":"秋","trees":"绚丽的红、橙、金三色枫叶","ground":"步道上铺满温暖的琥珀色光芒","atmosphere":"山坡上色彩鲜明的秋景"},{"season":"冬","trees":"光秃的树枝，树木、桥梁、屋顶和栏杆上覆盖着厚厚的积雪","ground":"积雪的河畔小径","atmosphere":"阴天多雪，飘着雪花，带着寒冷的雾气"}]},"human_elements":{"count":4,"description":"每个面板左侧河畔步道上有少量行人，比例自然，作为风景的陪衬"},"signage":{"count":1,"description":"右侧河岸旅馆附近有一块带有日文汉字的竖立石碑"},"style":{"look":"高度细节化的写实旅游摄影","lighting":"自然的季节性光照，电影感，水中真实的倒影","composition":"宽阔的风景视野，步道和桥梁形成引导线，建筑与自然平衡","quality":"超高细节，纹理清晰，逼真的水面、植被、木材、石材和积雪"},"prompt":"创建一个 2x2 的写实对比图像，展示 {argument name=\"location\" default=\"一个传统的日本山间温泉小镇\"} 在四季中的景象，且视角完全相同。场景中心是一条清澈的岩石河流，有一座小型拱形人行桥，左侧是带有黑色栏杆的石板河畔步道，右侧是一座大型木质日式旅馆，窗户透出温暖的灯光。远处添加森林覆盖的山脉和零星的城镇建筑。左上角面板标注“春”，展示樱花盛开的春季；右上角面板标注“夏”，展示郁郁葱葱的夏季绿植；左下角面板标注“秋”，展示鲜艳的红橙色秋叶；右下角面板标注“冬”，展示积雪的冬季树木、桥梁、屋顶和飘落的雪花。在每个面板的左侧步道上加入少量行人。在每个面板的左上角用白色添加季节汉字。强调真实的季节变化，同时保持所有四个面板的建筑、取景和透视完全一致。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 四季中的日本温泉小镇：此提示词可生成同一日本河畔温泉小镇的 2x2 四季对比写实拼贴图，适用于旅游视觉设计、氛围研究或排版与文字渲染演示。
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 风格对比、产品系列、前后对照、角色变体

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 综合视觉 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, 2x2, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: overcast, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
